creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
Please apply following patch.

Regargs.

Index: irc/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr1/freebsd/cvsroot/ports/irc/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.149
diff -u -r1.149 Makefile
--- irc/Makefile	11 Apr 2007 16:33:09 -0000	1.149
+++ irc/Makefile	4 Aug 2007 23:41:03 -0000
@@ -98,6 +98,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rbot
     SUBDIR += riece
     SUBDIR += riece-emacs20
+    SUBDIR += riece-emacs21
     SUBDIR += roxirc
     SUBDIR += ruby-irc
     SUBDIR += ruby-rica
Index: irc/riece/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr1/freebsd/cvsroot/ports/irc/riece/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.38
diff -u -r1.38 Makefile
--- irc/riece/Makefile	23 Jul 2007 09:36:02 -0000	1.38
+++ irc/riece/Makefile	4 Aug 2007 23:39:13 -0000
@@ -16,7 +16,6 @@
 COMMENT=	IRC client for Emacs
 
 USE_EMACS=	yes
-EMACS_PORT_NAME?=	emacs21
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-emacs=${EMACS_CMD} \
 		--with-lispdir=${PREFIX}/${EMACS_VERSION_SITE_LISPDIR}
Index: irc/riece-emacs21/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr1/freebsd/cvsroot/ports/irc/riece-emacs21/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.38
diff -u -r1.38 Makefile
--- irc/riece-emacs21/Makefile	23 Jul 2007 09:36:02 -0000	1.38
+++ irc/riece-emacs21/Makefile	4 Aug 2007 23:40:33 -0000
@@ -4,35 +4,9 @@
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/irc/riece-emacs21/Makefile,v 1.38 2007/07/23 09:36:02 rafan Exp $
 
-PORTNAME=	riece
-PORTVERSION=	4.0.0
-PORTEPOCH=	1
-CATEGORIES=	irc elisp
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SAVANNAH}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
-PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-${EMACS_PORT_NAME}
-
-MAINTAINER=	yasu@utahime.org
-COMMENT=	IRC client for Emacs
+MASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../riece
 
 USE_EMACS=	yes
-EMACS_PORT_NAME?=	emacs21
-GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--with-emacs=${EMACS_CMD} \
-		--with-lispdir=${PREFIX}/${EMACS_VERSION_SITE_LISPDIR}
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
-USE_RUBY=	yes
-RUBY_VER=	1.8
-
-INFO=	riece-en riece-ja
-
-post-install:
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-.for f in AUTHORS ChangeLog NEWS NEWS.ja README README.ja doc/HACKING doc/HACKING.ja
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${f} ${DOCSDIR}
-.endfor
-.endif
-	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
+EMACS_PORT_NAME=	emacs21
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
Index: irc/riece-emacs21/distinfo
===================================================================
RCS file: irc/riece-emacs21/distinfo
diff -N irc/riece-emacs21/distinfo
--- irc/riece-emacs21/distinfo	31 May 2007 18:03:49 -0000	1.21
+++ /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
@@ -1,3 +0,0 @@
-MD5 (riece-4.0.0.tar.gz) = 33056301675448150e96136a4a43f28d
-SHA256 (riece-4.0.0.tar.gz) = 035b7d3e624e230face7b1550df980214d23c01cb08ddd0c80b2781b5106bbe2
-SIZE (riece-4.0.0.tar.gz) = 373608
Index: irc/riece-emacs21/pkg-descr
===================================================================
RCS file: irc/riece-emacs21/pkg-descr
diff -N irc/riece-emacs21/pkg-descr
--- irc/riece-emacs21/pkg-descr	31 Oct 2004 13:46:22 -0000	1.2
+++ /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
@@ -1,13 +0,0 @@
-Riece is an IRC client for Emacs. It provides the following features:
-
-- Several IRC servers may be used at the same time.
-- Essential features can be built upon the extension framework (called
-  "add-on") capable of dependency tracking.
-- Installation is easy.  Riece doesn't depend on other packages.
-- Setup is easy.  Automatically save/restore the configuration.
-- Riece uses separate windows to display users, channels, and
-  dialogues.  The user can select the window layout.
-- Step-by-step instructions (currently written in Japanese) are included.
-- Mostly compliant with RFC 2812.
-
-WWW: http://www.nongnu.org/riece/
Index: irc/riece-emacs21/pkg-message
===================================================================
RCS file: irc/riece-emacs21/pkg-message
diff -N irc/riece-emacs21/pkg-message
--- irc/riece-emacs21/pkg-message	31 Oct 2004 17:08:16 -0000	1.1
+++ /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
@@ -1,6 +0,0 @@
-**********************************************************************
-To use riece, you should add the following line to your .emacs file:
-
-(autoload 'riece "riece" "Start Riece" t)
-
-**********************************************************************
